summary: Fabric three-skill (fabric-import / fabric-archive / fabric-review) contract fix + optimization. Closes the rc.5→rc.7 gap where fab_extract_knowledge MCP schema silently dropped relevance_scope/relevance_paths that skills were already writing. Adds doctor lint #26 + --apply-lint migration, extends fabricConfigSchema with 10 new tunables for skill-side pagination/thresholds, fixates knowledge_language at init time, bilingualizes 5 user-facing string classes across all three skills, syncs three-mirror copies (.claude + .codex + templates), adds fabric-review narrowing-imported chapter + fabric-import proposed_reason inference matrix, hardens import state.json with atomic .tmp+mv writes and corruption recovery.
approach: Phased delivery in 6 functional blocks (A: schema + service + migration, B: config + skill config-load chapter, C: init-time language fixation + i18n, D: protected tokens + idempotency note, E: review narrowing + import proposed_reason, F: state file hardening). Schema-first changes (TASK-001, TASK-004) unblock dependent skill MD edits (TASK-002 needs schema acceptance; TASK-005/007 need new config keys; TASK-009 needs schema-accepted relevance fields). Doctor lint #26 (TASK-003) is independent hygiene. Three-mirror sync (template → .claude + .codex byte-identity) is invariant — every SKILL.md edit triggers a same-task copy + install-skills-and-hooks.test.ts validation. rc.5→rc.7 idempotency formula at extract-knowledge.ts:78 sha256({source_session,type,slug}) is preserved verbatim.
estimated_time: 6-8 hours (33-66 minutes per task; mostly serialized due to schema→skill→mirror dependency chain; TASK-003/004/006/008/010/011 can parallelize)

design_decisions.decision: Use `pending:<idempotency_key>` sentinel for knowledge_scope_degraded.stable_id when emitted from extract-knowledge
design_decisions.rationale: Pending entries have no stable_id (Q2 late-bind contract — id allocated only at fab_review.approve). Sentinel preserves event schema shape without relaxing the contract.
design_decisions.tradeoff: stable_id field carries dual meaning (promoted id vs pending sentinel); consumers must parse the prefix — accepted because doctor + observability filters already string-key the field

design_decisions.decision: Migration via doctor lint #26 + --apply-lint, not standalone script
design_decisions.rationale: Reuses tested mutation machinery, integrates with maintenance_hint_days cadence, emits typed event for audit trail
design_decisions.tradeoff: Discoverability lower than CLI command; mitigated because meta-builder fallback at L1007-L1021 makes migration optional (hygiene-only, not correctness)

design_decisions.decision: Migration scope: pending entries only (not canonical)
design_decisions.rationale: Canonical entries already get scope via fab_review.modify natural path (C3 from rc.5); meta-builder fallback covers historical correctness
design_decisions.tradeoff: Audit-trail-incomplete for canonical entries; visible via lint #23 (narrow_no_paths) if regressions occur

design_decisions.decision: Caller-undefined relevance fields → don't write YAML lines (vs writing defaults)
design_decisions.rationale: Matches doctor.ts default-broad fallback; produces cleaner git diffs for unaffected entries
design_decisions.tradeoff: Less self-documenting frontmatter; mitigated because lint #26 + doctor surfacing makes defaults greppable

design_decisions.decision: Reuse scan.ts detectExistingLanguage as-is (README+docs CJK probe, no package.json)
design_decisions.rationale: package.json is almost always English ASCII (npm names) → would skew detection for zh-CN projects
design_decisions.tradeoff: Repos that gain CJK README post-init keep 'en' default; users can manually edit

design_decisions.decision: Three-mirror sync = always overwrite (skills are generated artifacts)
design_decisions.rationale: Treats SKILL.md as derived dist (consistent with install-skills-and-hooks.ts SKILL_DESTINATIONS fan-out)
design_decisions.tradeoff: User customizations to .claude/.codex copies are lost on fab init; mitigated because fabric-config.json is the user-editable surface

design_decisions.rationale: Preserves forward-compat with stale user config keys; matches existing 7-key minimal config behavior
design_decisions.tradeoff: Typos silently default rather than failing loudly; acceptable cost

design_decisions.decision: Aggregate relevance_migration_run event (one per --apply-lint run) vs per-file events
design_decisions.rationale: Quieter ledger; matches rc.5→rc.7 migration precedent; touched_count surfaces in doctor reports
design_decisions.tradeoff: Per-file traceability lost; mitigated by git diff visibility on actual frontmatter mutation

data_flow.diagram: Skill (fabric-import|archive) → MCP call with relevance_scope/paths → packages/shared schema accepts → extract-knowledge.ts service normalizes (silent degrade for personal+narrow) → renderFreshEntry writes YAML frontmatter → atomic write to .fabric/knowledge/pending/<type>/<slug>.md + emit knowledge_proposed event (+ knowledge_scope_degraded if degraded) → fabric-review reads pending → optional fabric-review modify (narrow-down) → fab_review.approve allocates stable_id + promotes to canonical → knowledge-meta-builder ingests for plan-context filtering

stages.input: git mining results / session candidates with proposed relevance_scope/paths

transformations: personal+narrow → broad+[] silent degrade with knowledge_scope_degraded emit (TASK-001)

recommended_execution_notes: Codex recommended due to High complexity + cross-package edits + multi-file three-mirror sync. Parallel-safe tasks: TASK-003, TASK-004, TASK-006, TASK-008, TASK-010, TASK-011 (no shared file edits). Serial chains: TASK-001 → TASK-002 → TASK-009 (schema must accept fields before SKILL.md references them); TASK-004 → TASK-005 (skills need new config keys); TASK-004+TASK-006 → TASK-007 (i18n needs both config + knowledge_language). Suggested execution order: TASK-001, TASK-004, TASK-006 (foundation, parallel) → TASK-002, TASK-003, TASK-005, TASK-008, TASK-010, TASK-011 (parallel) → TASK-007, TASK-009 (dependent).

dimensions.completeness: 11 tasks cover all 11 listed deliverables (A1/A2/A3/B1/B2/C1/C2/D1+D2/E1/E2/F1+F2); all decisions from clarification grill-me + skill-tuning audit applied
dimensions.granularity: All tasks 30-60 min scope; TASK-007 (5-class i18n × 3 skills) is largest at ~60min — kept whole because i18n consistency requires single-pass editing
dimensions.dependencies: 4 real dependencies (TASK-002→001, TASK-005→004, TASK-007→004+006, TASK-009→001); 7 independent tasks parallel-safe
dimensions.convergence_criteria: All tasks have 5+ quantified criteria (greppable presence checks, byte-identity diffs, lint exit codes, test counts)
dimensions.implementation_steps: All tasks have 5-7 actionable steps; explicit file:line references where applicable
dimensions.constraint_compliance: rc.5→rc.7 idempotency preserved (TASK-001 explicit assertion); three-mirror byte-identity (TASK-002/005/007/008/009/010/011); protected tokens preserved + extended (TASK-008); additive-optional schema (TASK-004)
